results.rendered_html:
upāhita p. p.
1 Deposited, placed.
2 Put on, worn.
3 Connected, joined; ˚śyāmarucaśca caṃdanāḥ  Ki. 8. 12  showing.
4 Ascribed or attributed to (āropita).
5 Agreed upon, done by mutual agreement.
— taḥ A fiery portent, danger or destruction from fire.
